hotels.name: Hotel Sarina Dhaka
hotels.description:
About this hotel
Check-in time: 2:00 PM
Check-out time: 12:00 PM
A 7-minute walk from Banani train station, this polished hotel in the city center is 2 km from the CTSB Baridhara Diplomatic Zone Office and 6 km from the Jatiya Sangsad Bhaban government complex.
Featuring city views, warm rooms with a traditional vibe offer free Wi-Fi, flat-screen TVs and safes. Upgraded rooms add sofas. Suites provide separate living areas; some offer whirlpool tubs.

Amenities consist of 3 upmarket restaurants, including Italian and Thai cuisines, along with a wood-panelled bar, a relaxed lounge and a coffee shop. There's also a fitness centre and a rooftop pool with city views. Breakfast is available for a surcharge.

Address and contact information
Plot #27 Road No. 17, Dhaka 1213
01730-020313

rooms.description: The ultimate luxury experience with panoramic city views.
Spacious room with king-size bed and premium amenities.
Wake up to the sound of waves right outside your window.

Our Deluxe Twin rooms are twin-bedded rooms good enough to share with two people. The rooms are well equipped with all the necessary amenities. The spacious bathroom is another great feature of this room.
